subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, inasmuch as the wine of divine utterance hath intoxicated thee to such a degree that thou didst sever the path of the world until thou didst enter My prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک بما اخذک سکر کوثر البیان علی شان قطعت سبیل العالم الی ان دخلت سجنی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
